title: Glassy-Jelly Romantic Kenyan Bake
description: A rich, glassy-jelly, romantic Kenyan dish featuring sugars, simmered to perfection. Serve in individual bento boxes for a delightful meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Line a 9x13-inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a medium saucepan, combine the honey, granulated sugar, and agave nectar. Place the saucepan over medium heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the sugars have dissolved.
Add the softened butter to the saucepan and stir until melted.
Add the sliced apples, grapes, and mint leaves to the saucepan. Stir to combine.
Pour the apple-grape mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the top of the apple-grape mixture.
Sprinkle the kosher salt over the top of the apple-grape mixture.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the top is caramelized and the apples are tender.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve individual portions of the Glassy-Jelly Romantic Kenyan Bake in bento boxes, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired.
